output.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?club WHERE {
  ?club wdt:P31 wd:Q15569200 ; wdt:P17 wd:Q32 ; wdt:P571 ?foundingDate ; wdt:P176 ?stadium ; wdt:P177 wd:Q3014305 .
  ?stadium rdfs:label 'Vojo Kushi Stadium' @en ; wdt:P572 'Vojo Kushi Stadium' @en .
}
ORDER BY ?foundingDate
LIMIT 1
